body: Checkpoint: replayed the finite search with explicit left and right cancellation and found no counterexample through order 6. Rationale: the earlier verifier flagged the cancellation predicate as the blocking ambiguity. Uncertainty: the isomorphism-pruning contract still needs independent replay. Next: have a verifier reproduce this artifact before extending the boundary.
artifact_summary: Command, seed, environment, and summarized branch counts for the replay.
